column1: Yandy Diaz leads the slate with a strong track record of consistency, hitting safely in over 76% of games and benefiting from the leadoff spot against Patrick Corbin, who offers a favorable matchup and slight park boost. Matt Olson is a close second, showing excellent reliability and a high hit probability, also enjoying the platoon edge at home. Oneil Cruz and Elly De La Cruz offer additional options, each with solid matchup factors and recent form.
